sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_multiplication (value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT, result FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_multiplication (value1, value2, result) VALUES (sql_mul(1.5, 4), sql_mul(2, 3), sql_mul(1.5, 4) + sql_mul(2, 3));
UPDATE test_multiplication SET result = sql_mul(value1, value2) WHERE value1 > 1;
SELECT value1, value2, result FROM test_multiplication WHERE result > 10;
SELECT sql_mul(10, AVG(value1)) AS avg_mult FROM test_multiplication;
